# Experiment Log

## Experiment 001

| | |
|---|---|
| Hypothesis: | Gradient boosting will outperform logistic regression on this dataset |
| Result: | XGBoost achieved F1=0.83 vs logistic regression F1=0.71; hypothesis confirmed |

## Experiment 002

| | |
|---|---|
| Hypothesis: | Feature engineering on tenure column improves F1 by >0.02 |
| Result: | F1 improved from 0.83 to 0.86 confirming the hypothesis |
